title: Water In Nether
description: Stops water from evaporating in the nether
body:
# Features / Use Case
To stop water from evaporating in the nether.
Normally, when you place a water bucket or melt ice in the nether it evaporates.

# Version support
Supports all versions from 1.14.4 to 1.21.10 with Fabric (isnt locked to 1.21.10, but it could need an update)

# Environments
This mod is only required on the server. \
If the client doesn't have it then the evaporation particles and sounds will appear, but water will still be placed.
